Index.title: Fastpik
Index.subtitle: Photo Culling Made Easy
Index.description: Online photo selection platform for professional photographers. Clients can pick photos directly from their browser.
Index.problemSubtitle: Do you also face these challenges?
Index.problem1Desc: Sending raw Google Drive links to clients looks unprofessional and messy.
Index.problem2Desc: Clients have to manually write down or note file names, making the process slow and tedious.
Index.problem3Desc: Without clear deadlines, clients keep postponing photo selection for months.
Index.problem4Desc: Links are not well-managed, making it difficult to track which clients have selected photos.
Index.problem5Desc: Admin forgets to remind clients even though the selection deadline has passed.
Index.problem6Desc: Using foreign platforms that are expensive and not suited for the Indonesian market.
Index.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need for photo culling process
Index.feature1Desc: Share link directly to clients via WhatsApp. No app download required.
Index.feature2Desc: Upload hundreds of photos from Google Drive without size limits.
Index.feature3Desc: Clients select photos directly in browser, results saved instantly.
Index.feature4Desc: Optimal display on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Index.feature5Desc: Dark mode for eye comfort when selecting photos.
Index.feature6Desc: Add password for extra security on your projects.
Index.feature7Desc: Clients can download photos directly from the browser, one by one or all at once.
Index.feature8Desc: Zoom into photo details before selecting, with swipe navigation.
Index.feature9Desc: Set the maximum number of photos clients can select as needed.
Index.feature10Desc: Send an extra link so clients can select additional photos beyond the initial quota.
Index.feature11Desc: Set link expiry separately for photo selection and photo download.
Index.feature12Desc: Send reminder messages via WhatsApp to prompt clients to select photos.
Index.feature13Desc: Interface automatically adapts between Indonesian and English.
Index.feature14Desc: Organize projects into folders with up to 5-level nesting for cleaner management.
Index.feature15Desc: Easily move projects and folders using drag & drop, including into breadcrumbs.
Index.feature16Desc: Customize WhatsApp message templates for sending links, results, and reminders to suit your needs.
Index.feature17Desc: Automatic notifications via Telegram when projects are nearing expiry. Set reminders for D-1, D-3, or any time.
Index.feature18Desc: Create dozens of projects at once via spreadsheet or multi-row form. Save time for large events.
Index.feature19Desc: Clients can review their selected photos before submitting to admin. Reduce revisions and miscommunication.
Index.feature20Desc: Clients select photos for printing with sizes (4R, 5R, 10R, etc.) and quota per size.
Index.feature21Desc: Use your own domain for a more professional look. From fastpik.ryanekoapp.web.id to gallery.yourstudio.com.
Index.step1Desc: Enter Google Drive link and client data
Index.step2Desc: Send gallery link to client via WhatsApp
Index.step3Desc: Client selects photos, you receive the list
Index.faqSectionSubtitle: Answers to common questions about Fastpik
Index.ctaSubtitle: Sign up now and enjoy 5-day free trial
Index.comparisonSubtitle: Compare Fastpik features with other platforms and see the difference yourself.

domainPromo.benefit1: More professional branding — clients see your studio name in the URL
domainPromo.benefit3: Look more professional and trustworthy to clients
domainPromo.oneTimeAppliesBoth: one-time payment, valid for Fastpik & Client Desk

domainPage.heroDesc: Use your own domain to look more professional. Your clients will be more impressed and trusting.
domainPage.brandDesc: Your own domain makes your studio look more established and trustworthy to clients.
domainPage.urlDesc: From fastpik.ryanekoapp.web.id/... to gallery.yourstudio.com/... — much easier to remember!
domainPage.seoDesc: Your own domain helps improve your studio's visibility on search engines.
domainPage.customDesc: Logo, favicon, and appearance can be customized to match your studio brand.
domainPage.separateDesc: Your studio has its own identity, separate from the main Fastpik platform.
domainPage.proDesc: Clients will be more confident and impressed seeing your own studio domain name.
domainPage.pricingInc1Desc: SSL, Nginx, DNS — all handled by us
domainPage.pricingInc2Desc: Logo, favicon, and appearance matching your brand
domainPage.pricingInc3Desc: Technical assistance if any issues arise
domainPage.pricingDomainNote: Price does not include domain cost. Domain prices vary (~Rp 35k-300k/year depending on extension).
domainPage.ctaDesc: Contact us via Instagram for consultation and custom domain setup.

Features.pageDescription: Discover all the features that make your photo culling process easier and more efficient.

FAQ.pageDescription: Find answers to commonly asked questions about Fastpik.
FAQ.a1: Fastpik is an online photo selection platform for professional photographers. Your clients can select photos directly from their browser without downloading any app.
FAQ.q2: Do my clients need to create an account?
FAQ.a2: No! Clients simply open the link you send via WhatsApp. No registration or app download required.
FAQ.a3: Just 3 steps: (1) Create a project and enter your Google Drive link, (2) Share the gallery link to your client via WhatsApp, (3) Client selects photos and you receive the results.
FAQ.q4: Is there a limit on the number of photos I can upload?
FAQ.a4: For Pro users, there is no photo limit. Photos are pulled directly from your Google Drive, so capacity depends on your Google Drive storage.
FAQ.a5: Fastpik supports popular image formats such as JPG, JPEG, PNG, and WEBP stored in your Google Drive.
FAQ.a6: Starting from Rp 15,000/month for the 1-month plan. There are also 3-month and 1-year plans. All plans get full Pro access.
FAQ.a7: We only support payment via QRIS.
FAQ.a8: Yes! You can try Fastpik free for 5 days with full Pro features.
FAQ.q9: Can gallery links be password protected?
FAQ.a9: Yes, you can add a password to each project for extra security.
FAQ.a10: Yes, you can set link expiry separately for photo selection and photo download.
FAQ.q11: Can Fastpik be used on mobile?
FAQ.a11: Yes! Fastpik has a responsive design that is optimal on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
FAQ.a12: You can contact us via Instagram @ryanekoapps or through WhatsApp for priority support.

Tutorial.step1Desc: How to create a project and connect it to Google Drive
Tutorial.step1Detail1: Open Dashboard and click the 'Create New Project' button
Tutorial.step1Detail2: Enter the client name and Google Drive link containing the photos
Tutorial.step1Detail3: Set the maximum number of photos the client can select
Tutorial.step1Detail4: Add a password if needed for extra security
Tutorial.step1Detail5: Set link duration for photo selection and download
Tutorial.step1Detail6: Click 'Generate Link' and the gallery link is ready to share!
Tutorial.step2Desc: How to share the gallery link to clients via WhatsApp
Tutorial.step2Detail1: After the link is created, click 'Send to Client WhatsApp'
Tutorial.step2Detail2: A message template is auto-generated with the gallery link
Tutorial.step2Detail3: You can also copy the link and send it manually
Tutorial.step2Detail4: Client opens the link in browser — no app installation needed
Tutorial.step3Desc: How to view and manage client-selected photos
Tutorial.step3Detail1: Check the 'Client Status' tab on the dashboard to see progress
Tutorial.step3Detail2: Status updates automatically: Not Selected → Selecting → Reviewed
Tutorial.step3Detail3: Client sends the selected photo list to admin's WhatsApp
Tutorial.step3Detail4: Mark as 'Reviewed' after you finish checking
Tutorial.step4Desc: Customize message templates and Telegram bot
Tutorial.step4Detail1: Go to Settings → Message Templates tab to customize WhatsApp messages
Tutorial.step4Detail2: Set templates for initial link, extra link, selection results, and reminders
Tutorial.step4Detail3: Set up Telegram Bot for automatic notifications when projects near expiry
Tutorial.step4Detail4: Configure reminder days (D-1, D-3, D-7, etc.) as needed
Tutorial.step5Desc: How to create multiple projects at once from a spreadsheet
Tutorial.step5Detail1: Click the 'Batch Create' button on the dashboard
Tutorial.step5Detail2: Download the XLSX template and fill in client data
Tutorial.step5Detail4: Preview data, fix any errors, then import
Tutorial.tipContent: Use the Folder feature to organize projects by event or date. Drag & drop projects into the desired folder!
